puzzle0.title: BLACK BOX SECTOR CORRELATION
puzzle0.description: Match each recovered recorder sector with the correct incident event.

puzzle0.title: VOICE FRAGMENT ANALYSIS
puzzle0.description: Corrupted voice signature detected. Use the recovered pod, suit and black box records.

event1.text: Either somebody rewrote history, or I am remembering the wrong history.

event2.text: Honestly? I am not sure which one scares me more.

choice1.text: PROVE IT WITH THE BLACK BOX.

event0.text: Do not believe me too easily.

event1.text: That is how this place gets inside your head. It gives you the version of truth you already wanted.
Do not trust a man who just woke up in a coffin and immediately starts explaining reality.

event1.title: BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 01
event1.content:
21:09 — Crew Assembly
21:11 — Unauthorized Access Request
21:12 — Internal Channel Opened

Sector Integrity: 61%
Audio Layer: damaged
event1.caption: Recovered black box recorder sector 01.
event1.message: [BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 01 ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

choice0.text: HALE, WHAT WAS THE ACCESS REQUEST?

event1.text: Every corrupted file somehow agrees with Noah.

event2.text: That is either evidence... or a very committed liar.

event1.text: I remember the channel opening. I remember the pressure change. I remember thinking someone had made a mistake.
[NOTIFICATION QUEUED: BLACK BOX SECTOR 02 RECOVERED]

event2.title: BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 02
event2.content:
21:13 — Emergency Lockdown
21:14 — Manual Override Requested
21:14 — Override Source: INTERNAL

Sector Integrity: 54%
Command Chain: partially suppressed
event2.caption: Recovered black box recorder sector 02.
event2.message: [BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 02 ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: Trace result: internal source confirmed. Identity layer still suppressed.

event0.text: Fast is not the same as smart.

event1.text: I say that as someone who has made several fast and stupid decisions today.

event0.title: BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 03
event0.content:
21:15 — Voice Authorization Accepted
Identity: HIDDEN
Authorization Phrase: OPEN THE STATION

Sector Integrity: 43%
Voice sample recoverable
event0.caption: Recovered black box recorder sector 03.
event0.message: [BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 03 ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: [BLACK BOX SECTOR CORRELATION REQUIRED]
No. Sector one opened the channel. Sector two carried the override. Sector three accepted the voice. Rebuild the sequence, not the story you want.
Recovered fragments share matching audio signature. Voice sample integrity: 43%.

event0.text: Someone opened the station from the inside.

event1.text: That is how Alpha started.

backgroundEvent0.text: Great. The haunted recorder has opinions now. Exactly what I wanted today.

event1.text: Whatever he became after that... I do not know.

event2.text: But before Alpha, he was afraid of something outside. Not inside.

event0.text: I thought you would ask that.

event1.text: And I wish I could answer without being afraid of the answer.

event0.title: VOICE SAMPLE
event0.content:
VOICE SAMPLE
CORRUPTED
RECOVERY POSSIBLE

Recovered phrase:
"OPEN THE STATION"

Reference candidates:
- Ethan Hale
- Maya Chen
- Noah Voss

Manual identification required.
event0.caption: Corrupted voice sample recovered from black box recorder.

event0.text: Use me if you have to.

event1.text: But if the answer comes back as my voice, do not assume that means I remember doing it.

event0.text: Good. Do not let a living subject contaminate the sample.

event1.text: And yes, I know how cold that sounds. Science is not known for bedside manner.
Signature mismatch. The answer is in the suit ID, the pod records, and the medical scan.
[NOTIFICATION QUEUED: VOICE SIGNATURE MATCH COMPLETE]

event3.title: VOICE ANALYSIS RESULT
event3.content:
MATCH FOUND

IDENTITY: NOAH VOSS
AUTHORIZED COMMAND: OPEN THE STATION
TIMESTAMP: 21:15

Conflict: Noah Voss was registered inside emergency pod cryostasis before voice authorization was accepted.
event3.caption: Voiceprint match result from black box recorder sample.
event3.message: [VOICE ANALYSIS RESULT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: I was already in the pod. I remember the lock engaging.

event2.text: I remember cold. I remember glass. I remember Hale saying not to wake me.

event0.text: I remember hearing my own voice from outside the pod.

event1.text: That is not a memory a person should have.

event0.text: Because something was using his authorization.

event1.text: I did not lock Noah away to punish him. I locked him away because the station kept answering in his voice.
Fine. Secure it. But after that, we ask.
Then who opened the station?
